title: Nek's silly mod 2
description: Adds loads of things like the Blowyupy Projectile, Poo Block and so much more!
body:
# Version 2 of Nek's silly mod!
**Note: This is NOT an expansion of Nek's silly mod, it does not have the same items/things in it.** Here is what is in the mod: (MCreator screenshot) ![The stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/218142e8a149a66230113d31b41532b16f501d85.png)

What they do


1. Poo
This is just a block with an unsusual texture. Can you spot the open dishwasher in the block's texture?
2. Shootingstar
I am pretty sure (but do not know as I made this mod a long time ago) that right clicking while using this will shoot a Blowyuppy.
3. Blowyuppy
This will (I think) break blocks it touches after being shot by the Shootingstar.

There is also a creative Inventory tab named Nek Mod 2
Made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)
